title: Festivity
description: This resource pack adds rename based custom items, such as Santa hat, gift boxes, candies, pizzas, and more to come.
body:
[![Basil's Festivity](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bc816a4f93d1771f07717181153b2f3734053bdd.png)](https://basildoesminecraft.github.io/Festivity-website/)

### I am a new artist, and this is my first resource pack.
[![Support this Project](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6fa3d288f3bfa96a0b9944e141a4d42119e94bb0.png)](https://ko-fi.com/basilkofi)

[![Commission for this resource pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2e9ca9a6c52d559ceb80fd56a3edae1b86134333.png)](https://ko-fi.com/basilkofi/commissions)

[Commission items for this resource pack](https://ko-fi.com/basilkofi/commissions)



# Rename item in an anvil to get a whole new item.
![Rename Carved Pumpkin into Christmas Hat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/afdd78b969368ff5878750b493f2740f50b68e6f.png)

[![Visit gallery for all items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d4a12eff319e6e1b7dd386e2d0437685103cadf3.png)](https://basildoesminecraft.github.io/Festivity-website/)


## How does it work ?
You rename items in an anvil to get a custom items !
